audit_items.proof_trace: The function contains zero allocations — it is a single-line getter that returns `entry->error` directly. The universal quantifier `forall alloc(p) in sass_import_get_error_message` is vacuously satisfied. Memory ownership of `entry->error` is correctly managed by `sass_import_set_error` (allocates/frees old value) and `sass_delete_import` (final free).
